caption: A woman with dark hair and glasses is centered against a plain black background. She is wearing a light green tunic featuring red and black embroidery around the neckline and a dark beaded necklace. A small lapel microphone is clipped to the center of her garment. In the lower-left and lower-center areas of the scene, a logo consisting of a circular graphic and the text "NPTEL" is visible. Throughout the sequence, the woman speaks, with her facial expressions and mouth movements shifting as she talks. She uses her hands to gesture, moving them from a neutral position up and outward in front of her chest, with her fingers slightly spread to emphasize her points. The lighting remains consistent across the scene, focusing on the subject while the background stays dark and unchanging.
